blocks.text: Champions League Tuesday: Barcelona storm St. James', Bayern test Bergamo

Barcelona arrive at St. James' on the back of Saturday's 1-0 win over Athletic Club — clinical and in form. Newcastle are back in knockout European football and this ground is their fortress. The ★5 tie of the night.
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP — the biggest club match in Norwegian football history
